content.query:
SELECT distinct
emp.id as SALES_REP_ID
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName as SALES_REP_NAME
,'HSI' as BRAND_NAME
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_HSI_app_Appointments] app
 ,[ODS].[LP_HSI_Lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_HSI_emp_Employees] emp
 WHERE
 lds.slr_id = emp.id
and app.id = lds.app_id
and app.Sat = 1 
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) <= 30

union

SELECT distinct
emp.id as SALES_REP_ID
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName as SALES_REP_NAME
,'HSI' as BRAND_NAME
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_HSI_app_Appointments] app
 ,[ODS].[LP_HSI_Lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_HSI_emp_Employees] emp
 WHERE
 lds.slr_id2 = emp.id
and app.id = lds.app_id
and app.Sat = 1 
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) <= 30
